creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
As mentioned in the initial comment the patch passes "poudriere testport". Tested on 11-STABLE amd64.

Portlint still complaints that '"BROKEN_STRPTIME_DESC" has to appear earlier.'
but that seems to be false positive and is not a new issue.

As mentioned previously I intentionally don't use the undocumented LICENSE "framework", for details please see:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=195807 and
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=187926
